title: Chennai Property Tax 2025: How to Calculate & Pay Online
intro: Easily pay your property tax in Chennai via the official website of Greater Chennai Corporation. Property tax (Sotthu Vari) can be paid both online and offline and is calculated using the Reasonable Letting Value (RLV).

sections.content: The Greater Chennai Corporation levies property tax on residential and non-residential properties within city limits. Chennai is divided into 15 zones, and the tax is collected half-yearly.
How to Calculate Property Tax in Chennai

items: Visit the Chennai Corporation online portal
Click on Online Civic Services and choose Property Tax Calculator
Enter building type, area, location, occupancy type, and floors
Submit the form to view tax amount

sections.content: Property Tax = Base Value × Built-up Area × Age Factor × Building Type × Usage Category × Floor Factor
How to Pay Property Tax in Chennai Online

items: Select Property Tax Status / Pay Tax
Enter zone number, division code, bill number and sub number
Choose payment period and pay using card or net banking

sections.content: How to Pay Property Tax in Chennai Offline
Offline payments can be made via cheque or demand draft addressed to The Revenue Officer, Corporation of Chennai. Payments are accepted at authorised banks, E-seva centres and TACTC offices.
A 5% rebate up to ₹5,000 is offered for FY 2025–26 if the second half-year property tax is paid before 30th October 2025.

items: 25% discount for buildings older than 4 years

sections.content: Chennai property tax can be paid online or offline through official channels. Timely payment helps avoid penalties and ensures uninterrupted civic services.
